skill.name: example-skill
skill.description: Describe the skill in the same user-facing terms that `SKILL.md` frontmatter will need later.

authoring.singleJob: Describe one repeatable skill workflow and stop at Eval Brief ready.

shouldTriggerWhen: Request asks to create or refactor one reusable skill
shouldNotTriggerWhen: Task is repository policy or AGENTS maintenance
Task starts from a finished Eval Brief and asks for downstream eval authoring
Task is shared eval runtime implementation
stopConditions: More than one workflow is requested

boundaryGoals: Request routes cleanly to trigger, non-trigger, or stop-and-ask
nonGoals: Write concrete downstream eval cases in this step

activationProbes.prompt: Create one reusable skill from this request

comparisonFocus: Requests that should trigger skill authoring
Nearby requests that should not trigger skill authoring
notes: This artifact carries authoring intent only
Downstream eval authoring turns this into Promptfoo-native suite cases under evals/engines/promptfoo/tests/

negativeSignals: Asks for shared eval runtime implementation
Starts from a finished Eval Brief and asks for eval authoring
